home.authDisabledBody: Auth is not live yet. Music playback and the rest of the app still work normally for now.
home.emptyHeroTitle: Start playing music to build your home mix
home.emptyHeroDescription: Your most played YouTube artist, recent songs, and recent artists show up here once you have some listening history.
home.playYoutubeToBuildMix: Play a YouTube song to build your Made For You mix.
auth.signInDescription: Sign in to keep your playlists, preferences, and listening flow in sync.
auth.signUpDescription: Start building your own music space with search memory, playlists, and theme sync.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for your account and head back into Streamify.
auth.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email address to receive a reset link.
auth.resetPasswordEmailSent: If this email belongs to an account, a password reset link has been sent.
auth.resetPasswordLinkInvalid: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.passwordUpdated: Your password was updated. Sign in with your new password.
auth.fillAllFields: Fill in your email and password first.
auth.accountReady: Your account is ready and you are now signed in.
auth.signUpCheckInbox: Your account was created. Check your inbox if Supabase asks for any follow-up action.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Supabase reports this user is not confirmed yet. Check Authentication > Users and your email confirmation settings.
auth.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is not ready yet.
auth.accountCheckUnavailable: We could not safely verify whether this email already has an account. Configure the server auth check and try again.
auth.enterEmailBeforeGoogle: Enter your email first so we can check the right sign-in method.
auth.usePasswordInsteadOfGoogle: This email already has a password account. Sign in with your email and password to avoid creating a duplicate Google account.
auth.useGoogleInsteadOfPassword: This email already uses Google sign-in. Continue with Google instead.
auth.accountAlreadyExistsWithGoogle: An account with this email already exists with Google. Continue with Google instead of signing up again.
auth.accountAlreadyExistsSignIn: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead of creating another one.
auth.multipleAccountsDetected: Multiple accounts were found for this email. Sign in with your original method for now and clean up the duplicate in Supabase.
auth.googleSignInIncomplete: Google sign-in did not finish. Please try again.
auth.signInSuccessPlaceholder: Sign-in UI is ready. Connect your backend auth provider next.
auth.signUpSuccessPlaceholder: Sign-up UI is ready. Connect your backend auth provider next.
auth.termsNote: By continuing, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.slideTitleOne: A cleaner music space for every session
auth.slideDescriptionOne: Search across multiple sources, jump into full-screen playback, and keep everything in one polished player.
auth.slideTitleTwo: Themes, lyrics, and playlists that feel personal
auth.slideDescriptionTwo: Switch between light and dark styles, save your searches, and keep your listening history close.
auth.slideTitleThree: Pick up right where you left off
auth.slideDescriptionThree: Your saved setup, playback preferences, and search flow stay ready whenever you come back.
library.creator: Creator
library.nameItYours: Name it and make it yours
library.noSearchMatch: No library items match your search.
library.podcastsEmpty: Podcasts and shows will appear here.
library.createPlaylistModalDescription: Give it a name and description, then save it to your library.
library.name: Name
library.playlistDescriptionPlaceholder: Add an optional description for your playlist.
miniPlayer.enableAutoRetryQuestion: Enable auto retry if playback fails?
miniPlayer.enableAutoRetryDescription: Streamify retries once automatically and lets you know when it is retrying.
fullscreen.saveTrackToPlaylist: Save this track to one of your playlists.
fullscreen.createOneFromLibrary: Create one from Your Library, then add this song here.
fullscreen.turnLyricsBackOn: Turn lyrics back on from Settings whenever you want the Now Playing screen to fetch them again.
fullscreen.syncedUnavailable: Synced lyrics were not available for this track.
fullscreen.lyricsUnavailable: Lyrics are not available for this track yet.
fullscreen.playMoreToSeeRelated: Play a few more songs and related tracks will show up here.
settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Tune playback, lyrics, search, and controls the way a modern music app should. Changes save instantly and apply across the player.
settings.themeAndMotionDescription: Pick a dark or light theme for the app shell and control whether interface animations should run.
settings.themeDescription: Switch the app between a wider set of dark and light palettes without changing your saved playback preferences.
settings.disableAnimationsDescription: Turn off transitions and motion effects to keep the app lighter on lower-end devices.
settings.showSidebarActivityDescription: Keep recent cover shortcuts visible in the left sidebar for faster replays.
settings.languageDescription: Choose English for the current left-to-right layout or فارسی for translated text and RTL layout.
settings.musicBehavesDescription: These controls affect retry behavior, automatic continuation, and whether Streamify opens the immersive player when tracks begin.
settings.autoRetryPlaybackDescription: If a track fails, Streamify can ask first, retry once automatically, or leave playback errors entirely manual.
settings.autoplayRecommendedTracksDescri: When your queue ends, Streamify keeps the session going with related songs or recent favorites.
settings.openNowPlayingAutomaticallyDesc: Jump straight into the full-screen player whenever you start a track from search, home, or your library.
settings.searchPreferencesDescription: Set the source Streamify should favor first when you open Search without a saved query or direct URL parameters.
settings.defaultSearchSourceDescription: Choose the catalog you want Search to open with by default.
settings.rememberLastSearchDescription: Reopen Search with your last query, source, and filter instead of always starting fresh.
settings.readingAndInputDescription: Shape how the lyrics panel behaves and how quickly keyboard shortcuts move around the track.
settings.lyricsDescription: Fetch lyrics inside the full-screen player for supported tracks.
settings.autoScrollSyncedLyricsDescripti: Keep the active lyric centered as the song plays.
settings.keyboardShortcutsDescription: Use Space to play or pause, Left and Right arrows to seek, Up and Down to change volume, and F to toggle Now Playing.
settings.seekJumpLengthDescription: Choose how far forward or backward shortcut-based seeking should move.
settings.playbackStops: Playback stops when your queue ends
settings.searchRestores: Search restores your last query when available.
settings.searchOpensFresh: Search always opens fresh with your preferred source.
settings.quickHelpShortcuts: `Space` toggles play/pause, `Left` and `Right` seek, `Up` and `Down` adjust volume, and `F` opens or closes Now Playing.
settings.quickHelpLyrics: Turning off lyrics stops fullscreen lyric fetches immediately.
settings.quickHelpThemes: Themes now change the app shell between Streamify, Ocean, Amethyst, Sunset, Forest, Rose, Frost, Midnight, Ember, Aurora, Sapphire, Violet, Copper, Graphite, Lagoon, Ruby, Olive, Starlight, Dawn, Mist, Petal, Meadow, Daybreak, Linen, Sky, Lavender, Peach, Mint, Butter, Sage, Ice, Sand, and Blush.
settings.quickHelpReset: Reset restores playback, lyrics, search, theme, motion, and language preferences to the default Streamify setup.
collection.removePlaylistDescription: This removes the playlist from your library. Your liked songs and listening history stay unchanged.
settings.accountDescription: Stay signed in so you can manually sync your local library to Supabase.
settings.cloudSyncDescription: Nothing uploads automatically. Sync only starts when you press the button.
settings.syncEmpty: There are no local playlists or liked songs to sync yet.
collection.noMappedTracks: No mapped tracks were available for this {kind} yet.
